'''''Mara''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] belonging to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. ''Mara'' was assigned to the [[Hospital (XQ2 Platform)|Rebel hospital]] with cargo for the Rebels who were wounded during the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|evacuation]] of [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]. However while [[Tomaas Azzameen/Legends|Tomaas Azzameen]], piloting the ''[[Vasudra]]'', was delivering [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] to the Rebels, the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'']] and a pair of [[Lancer-class frigate/Legends|''Lancer''-class frigates]], the ''[[Cascade]]'' and the ''[[Blue Hawk]]'', dropped out of hyperspace and began a bombardment of the hospital, executed by [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]].

==Behind the scenes==
''Mara''{{'s}} fate is unclear, as it is possible for the vessel to escape, or be destroyed, depending on a number of situations made possible by random AI events in ''X-Wing Alliance'', as well as the actions of the player. Adding further ambiguity to the situation is the fact that not only does ''Mara'' only appear in XWA, it also does not reappear at any point during the rest of the campaign. ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' mistakenly refers to ''Mara'' as a [[Gallofree Yards, Inc./Legends|Gallofree Yards]] transport carrying bacta.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
